nasb.text: Let all bitterness and wrath and anger and clamor and slander be put away from you, along with all malice.

esv.text: Let all bitterness and wrath and anger and clamor and slander be put away from you, along with all malice.

cnv.text: 一切苛刻、惱怒、暴戾、嚷鬧、毀謗，連同一切惡毒，都應當從你們中間除掉。

ccb.text: 要从你们当中除掉一切的苦毒、恼恨、怒气、争吵、毁谤和邪恶。

csbs.text: 你们要除掉一切苦毒、暴怒、愤怒、喧嚷、毁谤，以及一切的恶毒；
